conditionNode.nodeInfo: The condition node dosen't producs any outputs. It evaluates which path to execute based on the condition. To reference previous nodes in downstream paths, reference the previous node's output fields.

message.title: Message
message.description: Send a message in a chat at this step in the conversation.

image.title: Image
image.description: Send a image in chat at this step in the conversation.

card.title: Card
card.description: Send a card (a component with image, title, description, and button) in chat at this step in the conversation.

carousel.title: Carousel
carousel.description: Send a carousel (a gallery of multiple cards) in chat at this step in the conversation.

input.title: Input
input.label: Input
input.info: Pass data of different types into your workflow.

output.title: Output
output.label: Output
output.info: Output data of different types from your workflow.

text.title: Text
text.label: Text
text.info: Accepts Text from upstream nodes and alows you to write additional text / concatinate different texts to pass to downstream nodes.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.label: Knowledge Base Reader
knowledge.info: Semantically query a knowledge base that can contain files, scraped URLs, and data from synced integration (e.g., Google Drive).

talk.title: Talk
talk.label: Talk
talk.info: Send a given message at a stage in a conversation.

condition.title: Condition
condition.label: Condition
condition.info: Specify a series of condition and excute different paths based on the value of the conditions.

merge.title: Merge
merge.label: Merge
merge.info: Recombine paths created by a condition node. Note: if you are not using a condition node, you shouldn't use the merge node.

url.title: URL
url.label: URL Loader
url.info: Scrape the contents from the URL.
